mnemonics.title: Blocks of Code
mnemonics.content: B - Body of a method (Method Block), C - Condition based (Conditional Block), L - Loops (Loop Block)

mnemonics.title: Block Types
mnemonics.content: Meet Charlie Loop (MCL) - Method, Conditional, Loop

mnemonics.title: Code Readability
mnemonics.content: CRISP - Comments, Readable, Indentation, Structure, Proper naming
